subject: Continuous Random Variables
topic: §35 The Normal Approximation to the Binomial Distribution
question: A vote on whether to allow the use of medical marijuana is being held. A polling company will survey 200 individuals to measure support for the new law. If in fact 53% of the population oppose the new law, use the normal approximation to the binomial, with a continuity correction, to approximate the probability that the poll will show a majority in favor?
